programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Travis Scott is here to show Rob, Chanel and Sterling what it's like "Getting Action Figured," fend off the "Antidote Side Effects," and celebrate with some "Masters Of The Dark."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass legend Danger Ehren teaches Rob, Steelo and Chanel the pain of GETTING DONKEY'D, how to avoid DENTAL DANGER and get adorable with some WHISKEY PETS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 25
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by none other than Rob's dad, Gene Dyrdek who teaches the gang about THE POWER OF MAGNETS, that it's NEVER TOO LATE and the mysterious GREY GUNNERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 710
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel meet with motorcycle madman Robbie Maddison showcase some "Mini Madd Asses", cause some serious "Grammage"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 808
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Hampton Yount joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to check out the danger of "Risky Bits", listen to some "Next Level Narrators" and learn what it means to get "Hamspired".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On a very special awards show episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel give out Ridicky Awards such as "THE BIGGEST DICK", "THE FREEDOM FALCON" and "THE GRAND SLAM" to the stars of some of the greatest clips from the last 10 seasons.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ASS MASTERS, avoid the BOOGIE KNIGHTS and discover the disgusting side of MOTHER BIRDING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On a special episode of Major Key-diculousness, DJ Khaled teaches Rob, Chanel and Sterling how to be GRATEFUL, how to avoid THEY and how to get LOST AT SKI.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 825
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, the hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 727
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Chris "Drama" Pfaff sits down with Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Fully Reckless," go on some "Sketchy Flights" and get saved in time by "Life Savers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Big Baby D.R.A.M. joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get into some BAD BROCCOLI, learn how to speak UNCLISH and fend off a few URBAN PREDATORS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called TRAFFIC TAG, receive some DICK TIPS and things get messy when they POP THE MAN-PAGNE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 824
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the SNACK ZONE, learn the dangers of hiring BUDGET BABYSITTERS and root on reckless golf cart drivers in COUNTRY CLUB DRIFT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 718
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motocross champion Ryan Villopoto joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to learn when it's "Time To Retire," start some "Workplace Throwdowns"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Tooth Fairy Tats: Cartman gets $2 from the Tooth Fairy, which leads him to a scheme to buy a new videogame. It's not long before the boys are caught up in the black market tooth racket.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Do The Handicapped Go To Hell? The boys are convinced they will go to hell when they die unless they confess all their sins. Satan is torn between two lovers: Chris and Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: 4th Grade: The boys enter the 4th grade and take a fast dislike to their new teacher, Ms Choksondik. Meanwhile, Mr Garrison realises he needs to acknowledge and confront his "gay side". (S4, E11)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Trapper Keeper: Cartman is none too happy when 'Bill Cosby' tells him his ultra-advanced Trapper Keeper 2000 is destined to become sentient and wipe out humanity. That kinda sucks ay? (S4, E12)

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Manbird season hits New York City, and Mark finds himself the guardian of a fledgling separated from its flock.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy, on a 36 year mission in space, go crazy from boredom. Penniless and hungry, Ren and Stimpy seek work as mice catchers - with Ren as the bait.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Captain Hero attempts to pledge a new neighborhood Greek family, and Ling Ling's dad moves in.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero must become cool in order to save the world, and Toot and Ling-Ling take up cockfighting.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: During Lawndale's homecoming parade, Daria and Tom find themselves reluctantly wrangling a precocious child together.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lawndale High holds a medieval fair to raise money for a new library roof, and Quinn tries out for the lead in a play.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The surviving roommates return home to cast a new roommate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Stimpy becomes overly superstitious. He continues to live by his superstitions and Ren keeps disbelieving. Ren and Stimpy travel to a new country and take the viewer along.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero faces off against Super Nanny, and Ling-Ling grapples with his cultural identity.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Daria and Quinn attend a camp reunion, Trent does some soul-searching, and Jake and Helen air their grievances while cleaning the garage.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Twayne and Callie build a summer camp to cover up their raid on a wizard training ground.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jane and Daria team up for an art contest depicting their idea of student life at the dawn of the millennium, but their negative approach doesn't sit well with everyone.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The students of Lawndale High take a paint-balling field trip, and Daria and Quinn are in for a surprise when their parents sign up as chaperones.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ren is suffering from allergies. Little does he know that he may be allergic to his best pal. Ren and Stimpy leave the country when it rains and their fields are ruined with fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: Daria has mixed feelings when she applies for a scholarship sponsored by a company known for unethical business practices, and Jane resents the scholarship process.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: A teachers' strike at Lawndale High results in Daria instructing Quinn's English class, and teachers turn to Trent and Jane for artistic advice.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Councilman Fitzpatrick sells his soul to Twayne, and Callie considers a cushy job in Hell.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Captain Hero and Wooldoor battle over Unusually Flexible Girl, and Foxxy has a run-in with Foxxy 5.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy pass through a black hole and mutate in their strange surroundings. Stimpy invents a happy helmet that pushes the naturally angry Ren past the happy limit into madness.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Two wacky radio DJs broadcast their show outside of Lawndale High, and Daria's grandma Ruth moves into the Morgendorffer household after Jake suffers a medical emergency.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy go to the Natural History Museum to see the skeletal remains of the mammoth Stimpysaurus. Wilbur Cobb tells them about the evolution of the great beast.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: The editor of a teen magazine comes to Lawndale High to hang out with Daria, Jake struggles with the latest teen lingo, and Jane's clever idea begins to take root.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 513
programme.desc: The delivery of the family's new refrigerator stirs up repressed childhood memories for Daria and leads to a much-needed talk with her parents.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Foxxy challenges the Board of Education, and Spanky and Xandir embark on a sham marriage for insurance.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's being sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Offspring S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Nina's life has gone from bad to worse since her family discovered her secret and nobody is willing to forgive her.

programme.title: Offspring S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Having decided to accept a job in Baltimore and make a fresh start, the new Nina is determined to make a clean getaway.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Six months after fleeing from her unhinged family and fraught love-life, Nina is enjoying a calm existence in Baltimore. When an emergency brings her back home, Nina is quickly reminded why she left.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Nina is caught off-guard when she meets an unconventional couple wanting a completely nude birth.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Nina tries, and fails, to fight her attraction to Fraser and soon ends up on a date with the young registrar. Meanwhile, Cherie makes a big decision about Sam, and Billie begins fertility treatment.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Nina and her work colleagues are up in arms about the new anesthetist, Patrick. Meanwhile, Jimmy and Mick console each other after their respective partners insult their manhood.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Nina struggles to decide on a course of action after Fraser freezes again during a routine consultation. Meanwhile, Mick and Andrew fight over old issues, and Jimmy is upset by his parents' hypocrisy.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Cherie discovers that Jimmy and Tammy are planning a secret wedding, Nina rallies the Proudmans in an attempt to reunite her family. Amidst the chaos, Billie, Mick and Andrew try to make a baby.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: After a tragedy at work, Nina and Patrick console each other. Could this new intimacy lead to something more? Meanwhile, Billie and Mick get the results of their pregnancy test.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Exhilarated after their night of passion, Nina is determined to master the art of a casual fling. However, Patrick seems to want something more. Is Nina ready for another complicated relationship?

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Determined to be professional and forget her personal problems with Patrick, Nina is alarmed when Clegg requests they write a report together. Meanwhile, Billie and Mick accidentally buy a house.

programme.title: Offspring S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Nina hosts a dinner party at Patrick's, where he charms the Proudmans.

programme.title: Deception

These Deadly Women, once a vision in white, become their husbands blackest hour when murder is their escape from an ‘Inconvenient Marriage’.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dora in Wonderland: While Dora's kitties run through a magic mirror, Dora becomes Dora in Wonderland! Join her and Boots on a double-length adventure through the magical, mixed-up world of Wonderland!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Blaze and his driver AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines! When a truck named Crusher uses dirty tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends beat Crusher! Part 1.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Everyone's getting ready for the big Thanksgiving Day parade and dinner, but the Pirate Piggies accidentally float away on Dora's boat float.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Blaze smells smoke at Axle City’s garage, he calmly and courageously leads his friends outside to safety. Axle City’s fire chief is impressed with Blaze’s courage and thinks maybe he has what it takes to be a fire fighter, too.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine attend a party at Samira's palace. Zeta crashes the party pretending to be Samira. Zeta uses a potion to swap Leah's voice with a bird's. Will Shimmer and Shine understand Leah's tweets?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lost and Found: Dora and Boots find a little baby blue bird who fell out of her nest.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After searching endlessly for Zac's missing dinosaur toy, Leah asks her genies to wish up a replacement and gets stuck with a real live Apatosaurus! Leah, Shimmer, and Shine have to figure out a way to fix this behemoth mistake.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 114
programme.desc: Geo and his friend Dylan find out that the ice cream truck is missing! Geo meets up with Milli and Bot, and they set out to find the missing truck and solve its problems.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Blaze and Stripes transform into ferociously fast jungle cats to race in the Animal Island Championship! But to win, they’ll have to beat Crusher disguised as a cheating cheetah. Can they claw their way to victory?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With her brave dog at her side, Dora races on her scooter to the Big River so they can rescue Boots.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures, and today he's ready for his first treasure adventure! We help Little Map draw pictures and play map games to find the treasure at Treasure Mountain!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Kittens in Mittens: Dora is reading a book of nursery rhymes to Abuela's kitty, Lucky. Lucky loves the one about the three little kittens who ring the bells on their mittens as they dance and sing!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A cute little Zenguin takes a wishing coin and leads the girls on a chase around their new boat. / The girls visit Imma, the Waterfall Genie, at her home for a pool party, not knowing that Zeta is close behind.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's doing magic tricks for us today! For his first trick, he turns Boots into a chicken! But when he's going to turn him back into a monkey, he lets out a big sneeze that sends the wand flying off into Magic Land where it breaks!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dora, Emma and Kate help Gus the Bus take all of the instruments to the kids at Music School.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 218
programme.desc: The King of Numbers - Part 1: Join Milli, Geo, and Bot for their greatest adventure ever, as Team Umizoomi sets off on a journey to visit their friend, the King of Numbers, in his magical kingdom.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When Zeta's sister comes to visit, Zeta is shocked to discover that her once sorcerific sister is now a genie! When Samira sends the girls out on a fun quest, Zeta tricks them into finding a bunch of magical items for her instead.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: It’s the second ever Team Truck Challenge - a big race that pairs trucks together in racing teams. And this time Blaze's teammate is...Crusher?! Will Crusher be able to resist his cheating ways to win for the very first time?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dora gets to start the Big Gymnastics Show! But when Swiper swipes her special rainbow ribbon, Dora and Boots need your help on a gymnastics-filled adventure to get it back so they can begin the show! Fantastic gymnastics!

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Buhdeuce's life is about to change forever when SwaySway gives out an award in 'Employee of the Month', then in 'Brocrastination', the duo must take care of a pile of dirty dishes.

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 114
programme.desc: Birds of a Feather: When SwaySway and Buhdeuce are trapped in a cave of stale bread by a ferocious Tunnel Eater, the guys pass the time by reminiscing about how they first met and became best baps.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Danny and Sam get into a fight, and when Sam utters the words, "I sometimes wish I'd never met you," she finds herself in a world in which she and Danny are strangers.

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce introduce their number one customer to the Bread Maker in 'Introducktions', and then in 'Fowl Feud', our dynamic duo get into a feud and might just part ways forever!

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Craig can’t stop eating Megan’s pet gerbil. Sanjay and Craig must re-enter their dream to rescue Belle.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S3 Ep. 12

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: When SwaySway suffers a major butt injury, Ketta takes over in 'Substitute Breadwinner', then in 'Taloney Baloney', SwaySway and Buhdeuce discover that T-Midi was a child star.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Sanjay and Craig try to find the "hook" to help a boring puppy find a home. What starts as Sanjay and Craig playing a schoolyard game turns into a mythic adventure involving a girl in trouble, Darlene and a villain called the Butt Master.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Sanjay and Craig seek to create a symphony of farts, and one person holds the one they desperately need: Noodman. When the kids discover a mysterious object buried in Sanjay's backyard, their imaginations run wild.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The boys go undercover to defend their video game dominance at the Frycade. Sanjay and Craig decide to get a dog but end up with 100 dogs.

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: In an effort to not be the forgotten men of Royal Woods Elementary, Lincoln and Clyde do whatever it takes to get into yearbook group photos. Seeing his sisters squabble with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a roommate shuffle.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 13

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 207

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: There's a new ghost in town - Amorpho, who can become anyone he sees. He decide to switch with Danny but when their powers collide, it makes a mess of things!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Jimmy redesigns his Nanobots to correct his homework, but soon they start to correct everything in the world.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The Guys in White have finally caught on: Jack's a genius, how could they have not seen this before? They offer Jack and Maddie millions for FentonWorks and before you can say "movin' on up" -- right next to mayor Vlad!

programme.desc: When Sanjay and Craig get the once in a lifetime opportunity to work at the Frycade, they soon discover Belle's secret life. Sanjay develops an allergy to Craig - could this mean the end of the dude snake duo?

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Ketta rebuilds Lil Loafie into a law enforcement machine in 'Roboloafie', and then in 'Bad Zituation', SwaySway runs away to Monster Island when he gets a zit that he thinks makes him look hideous.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An old rivalry between Darlene and Noodman is reignited when the guys discover a Friend Card. Sanjay and Craig become beach bums for a day.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Box Ghost is tired of being unappreciated as a terrifying ghost. Frustrated, he turns to the box belonging to Pandora, and every time he opens it he unleashes a new evil on the town!

programme.desc: A dare leads Jimmy and pals to stay over night at Retroland to prove once and fall all the existence of the park's phantom. Not to dissimilar to 1958's 'The Fly', an accident rearranges the bodies and heads of Jimmy and Carl's pet hamster.

programme.desc: Eugene's Birthday/Stinky's Pumpkin: When Arnold is the cause of two birthday parties for Eugene being a big flop, Eugene takes it in stride and chalks it up to his usual round of bad luck.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Remy returns and all he wants to do is hang out with Timmy's life easy. Have you ever seen the inside of the castle in Cosmo and Wanda's fish bowl? Neither has Timmy, and it's driving him crazy!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Fairy Con/The Hungry Games: Mr. Crocker creates Wonky Cosmo and Wanda clones to get into a Fairy Convention to steal all the fairies’ magic. Timmy wishes Chloe could live out her favorite dystopian movie, but quickly regrets it when everyone is hungry.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Finding Emo/Dust Busters: Timmy likes a new girl at school. He wishes he was "emo" and stops caring about everything. Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Otto's ego gets the best of him when he tries the Super Mcvarial 900, a move that Sam swears cannot be done. The kids' friendship with Sam is tested when he hooks up with a computer geek named Oliver.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Vicky Gets Fired/CHINdred Spirits: Vicky is determined to get a job after Timmy's parents fire her. Timmy wishes up a girlfriend for Crimson Chin and soon the Chin dating a woman named Golden Locks…except now the comic is both boring and romantic.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 60
programme.desc: At the Parent's Day competition, Arnold learns that even though he doesn't have \"real\" parents, his grandparents are just as good as everyone else's parents.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Wanda pays a visit to her successful twin sister Blonda. / Timmy helps Mark Chang celebrate the Yugopotamian holiday FLARG on earth.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Bio Square/Partners: For their science fair project Arnold and Gerald planned to lock themselves in Grandpa's dilapidated greenhouse in the back yard for twenty-four hours.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 60
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do by his parents, Timmy wishes that he would have to do the opposite of whatever his parents told him. Timmy wishes he was a teenager to ride the cool new ride at the amusement park.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Crocker Shocker/Super Zero: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies and becomes normal again. Unfortunately, Fairy World can no longer feed off his spastic energy, and all their magic shuts down.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 59
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga perform a \"Romeo and Juliet\"- type play for a school production

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 76
programme.desc: Grandpa's sister, Mitzi, shows up out of the blue to grace the boarding house with her presence. When Coach Wittenberg needs to form a synchronized swim team to save his job, he recruits Arnold.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Tour de Pond/Teacher's Strike: After happening upon a snotty rich kid named, Rex, who is legendary for winning the annual toy boat race, Arnold and Gerald decide to enter the race.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ray's about to take the kids away for a surfing trip but Otto gets a bad grade in school and isn't alowed to go. When Otto accidentally collides with Merv, local activists use it to ban skateboarding.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Add-A-Dad/Squirrely Puffs: Dad is too busy to spend quality time with Timmy, so he wishes up "a-lot-a-dads" to hang out with. It's a race between the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs to the top of Mount Doom!

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 80
programme.desc: By complete coincidence, Arnold and Helga and family end up at the same beach resort for summer vacation. Helga is ecstatic until Arnold meets Summer, the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Cosmonopoly/Hero Hound: Timmy, his dad, and fairies get stuck in a board game created by Cosmo. Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic. Dad thinks he can talk to animals.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Poof and Foop compete to win the affections of Goldie Goldenglow, a magical new girl at Spellementary School (who’s shaped like a triangle) while participating in the Spellementary School play, "Mr. Cookie’s Happy Day."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Turning into Turner/The Wand That Got Away: Using Timmy’s DNA, Crocker pretends to be Timmy from the future. Cosmo loses his wand and Timmy and the gang must help find it.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mice-Capades/Formula For Disaster: Poof has been watching too much of a classic, yet violent "cat & mouse" cartoon. He innocently turns Timmy and Vicky into "Cheesy and Sleazy" and all mayhem breaks loose.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Grandpa returns back to grade school so he can finally fulfill his dream of graduating. Mr. Simmons gives the class an assignment to couple up and takes care of an egg over the weekend.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: James helps Camille run lines for an audition and they end up kissing! Meanwhile, Gustavo tries to set up Carlos with his first girlfriend, and Kendall and Jo try to balance their hectic schedules so they can see each other.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After Drake forgets Josh's birthday he tries to make it up to him by taking him to a live taping of "Oprah". Things, however, take a turn when they run into an unexpected guest.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It’s Halloween in Palm Woodsylvania and the monstrous personas of Big Time Rush come to light. James is a sexy vampire, Logan is a zombie who keeps losing his limbs, Carlos is Franken-Carlos, and Kendall is a werewolf.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 315
programme.desc: After Dub goes to Vegas and leaves Trip behind, the Game Shakers take Trip to Dub's awesome apartment to show him a good time.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: BTR is too famous to be living at the Palm Woods, so Gustavo moves them to Bel Air. However the rules that come with upscale living don’t agree with the guys and they plot their grand escape back to the Palm Woods.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 125
programme.desc: While at Tech Fest, the Game Shakers enlist the Girls Who Code to help them take down an old enemy of Double G's who has returned seeking revenge.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 122
programme.desc: Trip beats a gaming legend, landing him a sponsorship deal with a big company. When the deal turns out to be a nightmare, Dub and the kids must help out.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Big Time Bonus: Gustavo gives the guys a bonus for their hard work, but they quickly begin to make bad decisions with their money.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 110
programme.desc: You Bet Your Bunny: The Game Shakers host a tournament to promote a new Sky Whale update. Double G bets Bunny, thinking Babe will beat one of her classmates. (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: In order to finish their new dance game on time, The Game Shakers have to wear a motion capture suit and dance their way through the next 48 hours.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When the Premiere Movie Theater plays host to an actual movie premiere, Josh must act as personal assistant to the film's high maintenance child star.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Megan's been extremely secretive and Drake and Josh investigate to find out what she's up to.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A teen magazine runs a “Win a Date with BTR” contest, and the 4 lucky winning girls – each with their own baggage – give the guys serious dating drama.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Drake is unable to break up with his inappropriately laughing girlfriend because she is the daughter of his teacher who has threatened him with summer school.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Drake and Josh meet the "Great" Henry Doheny, one of the greatest magicians ever - who has fallen on tough times.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Double G has scared Triple G every Halloween since he was a baby. This year he asks Babe and Kenzie to help, but they double-cross him by telling Trip!

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Kenzie is torn whether to tell on Dub after she sees him tear down his own statue.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: The girls go to Utah to rescue Trip after Dub sends Trip to Captive Meadows - a center for boys with bad behavior.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Josh befriends Drake's doppelganger, a classmate named Drew, and Drake becomes jealous, fearing that Josh is trying to replace him.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: When Dub's brother shows up at Game Shakers and invites everyone except Dub to his wedding, the kids convince him to bring his brother into the fold, promising to make Dub behave himself at the event.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers are kicked out of Fooders to make room for a guest who has his photo on the wall, Babe is determined to get their own photo up using any means necessary. Game Component: "Spitty Llama" (App)

programme.desc: When Drake and Josh find out Megan have adopted a pet sheep, they want nothing to do with it.
